name: rustunnel
description: Expose local services via secure tunnels. Create public HTTPS/TCP URLs for webhooks, demos, and AI agent workflows.

server.title: Server Address
server.description: Tunnel server address (e.g. eu.edge.rustunnel.com:4040 for hosted, or localhost:4040 for self-hosted)

api_url.title: Dashboard API URL
api_url.description: Dashboard API URL (e.g. https://eu.edge.rustunnel.com:8443 for hosted, or http://localhost:4041 for self-hosted)

token.title: API Token
token.description: API token for authentication (from rustunnel.com dashboard or your self-hosted admin token)
